docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,400.00 FILED BY LEE, YOUNG AS TO DEFENDANT SIMPSON, RAYMOND ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
